rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday December 19, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFF PRIYA SANGER, MICHAEL SANGER Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction Ccp 527 OFF CALENDAR, Notice of Removal on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SARAH HUNTOON ET AL VS. STEFAN ERIC ADLER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday December 19, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT STEFAN ADLER, JENNIFER ROSDAIL Notice Of Motion And Motion For Monetary Sanctions DENIED. Moving party failed to establish compliance with CCP 128.5(f)(1). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LEE HARBERT ET AL VS. 414 36TH LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday December 19, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT 414 36TH LLC, GENE KRISTUL, YEVA, INC. DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED OWNER LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY VS. BRIANNA GUERRERO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice And Motion; Memo Of P&A, And; Declaration For Order To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, And Leave To Amend
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday December 19, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANT AYESHA GAIKWAD Amended Notice And Motion For Order To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, And Leave To Amend OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice. Service by mail on November 26, 2018 did not allow 5 days for mailing in violation of CCP 1013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHIRLEY CONWAY VS. RATINUN SUPMITCHOTIMA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday December 19, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT RATINUM SUPMITCHOTIMA MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED. Moving party fails to show that Striking of the Complaint is a proper remedy for Plaintiff's alleged omissions, such as failure to file a notice of related case. To the extent Defendant is challenging the service of summons and complaint by allegedly improperly obtained order for posting and mailing, the argument is waived as Defendant has generally appeared without filed a Motion to Quash. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHIRLEY CONWAY VS. RATINUN SUPMITCHOTIMA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday December 19, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT RATINUM SUPMITCHOTIMA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Veracity of Plaintiff's allegations can not be properly addressed on a demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. SONIA DOE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday December 19, 2018 line 7. DEFENDANT SONIA MENJIVAR DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. Amended Complaint shall be filed and served within 5 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES, INC. VS. ASHLEY LEWIS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday December 19, 2018 line 8. DEFENDANT ASHLEY LEWIS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, dismissal on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DALLAS HOLFELTZ VS. HEALIIWAHINE STACIA BRITO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday December 19, 2018 line 9. DEFENDANT HEALIIWAHINE BRITO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. This Court has subject matter jurisdiction. = (501/REQ)
